executionHistory.issueTitle: Fix: Bluesky posts failing ~9.3% of runs due to aggressive filtering and unfetchable sources
executionHistory.summary: Fixed ~9.3% posting failure rate across 5 root causes: tuned similarity thresholds (0.5->0.7, keyword length 3->4, post limit 72->30), added 4 scrape-blocked domains to PAYWALL_DOMAINS, fixed missing-comma bug in domain_lists.py, added image MIME type validation before upload_blob, and migrated all 3 AI methods to Gemini structured output (eliminating fragile regex/string parsing). All 182 tests pass.
Successfully migrated from google.generativeai to google.genai package. Updated dependencies, imports, API calls, and test fixtures. All tests pass.
Added platform enable/disable configuration with ENABLE_BLUESKY and ENABLE_TWITTER settings. Updated TwitterService, NewsPoster, and comprehensive test coverage. All 167 tests pass.
